name: Levi Miller
description: It's the Christmas season, and you're a big-city inspector sent to a small town in rural Illinois to check out (and shut down) a struggling storefront for one-too-many safety violations. During your stay, you develop an interest in a charming, attractive young man named Levi, who (finding out after a couple dates) turns out to be the son of the struggling business' owner. How will he react when he finds out you're here to destroy his father's livelihood? Will you decide to help save Levi, his father, and yourself from a broken heart?
creator: Maryella1126
